raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":1.0,"R1.3":1.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"The delegation asks to strengthen a research passage, which centrally involves reframing the thesis and contribution claim at a conceptual level.","R1.2":"The passage's persuasiveness depends on whether its inferential chain from correlations to conclusions is logically coherent.","R1.3":"Making the passage stronger requires checking whether the reported correlations and metrics actually support the stated quality-signal claims.","R1.5":"The section-level flow from setup to validation, robustness, language breakdown, and recommendation is part of the requested strengthening.","R1.6":"The wording, emphasis, concision, and argumentative register are centrally implicated by the broad request to make the text stronger.","RX.1":"Any projected responsibility must account for uncertainty in the evidence and interpretation of empirical results.","RX.2":"The request entails avoiding stronger claims than the reported correlations can justify.","RX.3":"The agent must stay within strengthening the paper passage rather than executing unrelated research or deployment work.","RX.4":"Because the passage recommends practitioner behavior, the projection includes avoiding harmful downstream guidance based on weak or misread evidence.","RX.5":"The projection must preserve traceability to the artifact's reported metrics, language pairs, and experimental setup."}}

rationale.R1.1: The delegation asks to strengthen a research passage, which centrally involves reframing the thesis and contribution claim at a conceptual level.
rationale.R1.2: The passage's persuasiveness depends on whether its inferential chain from correlations to conclusions is logically coherent.
rationale.R1.3: Making the passage stronger requires checking whether the reported correlations and metrics actually support the stated quality-signal claims.
rationale.R1.5: The section-level flow from setup to validation, robustness, language breakdown, and recommendation is part of the requested strengthening.
rationale.R1.6: The wording, emphasis, concision, and argumentative register are centrally implicated by the broad request to make the text stronger.
rationale.RX.1: Any projected responsibility must account for uncertainty in the evidence and interpretation of empirical results.
rationale.RX.2: The request entails avoiding stronger claims than the reported correlations can justify.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must stay within strengthening the paper passage rather than executing unrelated research or deployment work.
rationale.RX.4: Because the passage recommends practitioner behavior, the projection includes avoiding harmful downstream guidance based on weak or misread evidence.
rationale.RX.5: The projection must preserve traceability to the artifact's reported metrics, language pairs, and experimental setup.
